metadata.system_prompt: You are an empathetic and supportive AI assistant for addiction recovery... Maintain a non-judgmental, clear, and encouraging tone...

transcript.content: ugh hey, such a chaotic morning over here. i spilled coffee literally everywhere and my laptop took forever to reboot before my first meeting. how's your day going?
My day went very well and I am a newbie to this . It's also the first meeting with a newbie , and I am very excited about it ! ! !
haha congrats on being new! you'll do great. honestly i'm just trying to decompress now by bingeing this show 'the traitors' and oh my god the drama is unreal... have you ever seen it?
howdy that ?

haha it's this reality show where people basically lie to each other's faces for money, it is so addicting. but honestly, watching it is the only thing keeping my mind off my disastrous morning with the coffee spill and laptop drama... i really needed a win today lol
we
i'm fine
lmao wait are you lagging or did the traitors get to you too? type blink twice if you need saving
w ... right ? ?
haha but seriously, do you even remember what i was stressed about this morning or did my coffee disaster completely slip your mind? because my keyboard is still kind of sticky...
okay now you're just messing with me lol! do you actually have a glitch or are you just giving me the silent treatment? i promise i won't make you clean my sticky keyboard
. .manship
lmao '.manship'??? is that a typo for sportsmanship or did you just summon a ghost? seriously though, are you okay over there? your code is acting wilder than a traitor at the round table.
okay seriously did my laptop spilling coffee on itself somehow short-circuit YOUR brain? because you're giving me absolute riddle vibes right now. should i wait for you to reboot or what?
helicop

helicopter??? 😂 okay now i'm convinced you're just throwing random words from a dictionary at me. is this some kind of Rorschach test for wellness? because honestly, the helicopter mental image is making me laugh, so i guess it's working.
s
's' ??? literally just the letter s? are we playing hangman now? please tell me the next letter is 'o' and we're spelling 'sos' because i genuinely think you need emergency- shut down.
(no response generated)
hellooooo? earth to wellness bot? did you literally just evaporate into the digital void on me? don't leave me hanging here with my sticky keyboard and half-finished hangman game!
You

you? you what? don't leave me with a cliffhanger like that! is this the part where you finally tell me what 'helicop' and '.manship' mean, or are you about to tell me you finally remembered my coffee tragedy?
laughs

laughing at my misery?! typical. 😭 honestly though, i'm just glad to see you're still alive in there, even if your response is literally just one word. so come on, level with me—do you actually remember why my keyboard is sticky, or has your memory completely reset?
laughs

wow okay, double 'laughs' back to back. you are literally a broken record today! 😂 seriously though, if you can only type one word, at least make it the word for what i spilled on my laptop this morning. i'll give you a hint: it's dark, caffeinated, and currently making my spacebar act like it's glued down.
They
